DP.028.0001:
Ooh, your Pokémon are so very
charming! How enchanting!\f
They’re so charming I will even hang
a picture of one right beside me!\f
I’m only doing this especially for
you! Exciting, don’t you think?\f
Dress up your Pokémon in my boudoir
and make it a sight to behold!\f
I will snap a photo when you’re done.
You will do this, won’t you?
DP.028.0002:
Oh, you silly thing...
Where’s your sense of adventure?
DP.028.0003:
Ooh, ooh, yes! How nice!
Let’s not delay!\f
Should I explain to you how to dress
up your Pokémon?
DP.028.0004:
Ooh, choose which Pokémon you want
to dress up.
DP.028.0005:
Teheheh...
I hope you will dress it up adorably!\f
DP.028.0006:
You have a Fashion Case, don’t you?
Ah, oui, wonderful!\f
Just choose the Accessories and put
them on your Pokémon.\f
When you’re done, I will snap a photo
and put it up beside me!\f
If you mix your records with others,
you can get their photos, too!\f
I think it will be much easier if 
you will just try!
DP.028.0007:
Ooh, nice work!
Let’s display the photo right away!\r
Oh, but it needs to have a title!
DP.028.0008:
[011C,0000]...\f
Ooh, yes, yes! I get it now!
Your aesthetics shine through!
DP.028.0009:
Oh, non, non, non!
It will be forlorn without a title.
DP.028.0010:
Oh... You came out without doing
anything... How disappointing.
DP.028.0011:
If you dress up any Pokémon again,
the photo here will be changed.\f
Would you like to dress up
a Pokémon, dearie?
DP.028.0013:
Ooh, non, non, non! That’s an Egg!
It’s too young to be dressing up!\f
DP.028.0014:
I put your photo up right here.
It just looks so perfect there!
DP.028.0016:
They display photos from Trainers
you been mixin’ records with, right?\f
I hope you collect yerself some good
photos of dressed-up Pokémon!
DP.028.0017:
I won a new Backdrop from the
Pokémon Lottery downstairs.
